choices.text: Current routine weather report at airport. Updated hourly. Standard format: KSFO 152254Z 28012KT 10SM BKN013 12/09 A3015 = SFO at 22:54 UTC, wind 280@12 kts, vis 10SM, broken 1,300 ft, temp 12/dew 9, altimeter 30.15.
aviationweather.gov + ForeFlight + 1-800-WX-BRIEF. Standard briefing required for IFR. Apps integrate METAR/TAF/PIREP/SIGMET. Cross-check sources before launch.
